productDisplayName: Baggit Women Angel Rosy Pink Mobile Pouch
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish mobile pouch from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the detachable shoulder strap. Dimensions: 17 cm x 11 cm Crafted from genuine leather and fabric Flap closures on both sides with magnetic button closures A zippered pocket at the centre One zippered pocket under the flap with the branding Detachable shoulder strap Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
